ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., LUK) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering (IPO) date of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the stock details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the price was recorded */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the stock */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* After-market price of the stock */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "volume_change" INTEGER /* Change in trading volume from the previous day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data (e.g., API, manual input) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, investor) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_stock_watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the stock to their watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock added to the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the watchlist entry was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the watchlist entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stock_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stock_watchlists_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_settings" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is for */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., price above, price below) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert setting was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the alert setting */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the alert is active or not */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_settings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the article is related to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article (e.g., Reuters, Bloomberg) */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the news article was added to the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the financial data belongs to */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the company */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the company */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the company */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the financial data was reported */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share of the company */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the company */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the company */,
  "debt_to_equity_ratio" REAL /* Debt-to-equity ratio of the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the financial record was added to the database */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the financial record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_financials_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of activity performed (e.g., login, logout, search) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the activity log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., stock performance, market trends) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* File type of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
